case_title: THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. A CORPORATION vs. MIRANDA, NELSON et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, NELSON MIRANDA, IVANIA
